languages.text: "Я выполни{mf|л|ла} твою просьбу и стою на месте. Теперь представься сама".

traits.locale_text: "Я выполни{mf|л|ла} твою просьбу и свою на месте. Теперь представься сама".

languages.text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."
languages.original_text: "Я выполни{mf|л|ла} твою просьбу и стою на месте. Теперь представься сама".

traits.locale_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."
"I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."
"I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

languages.text: 「あなたの要求は満たされた。私は動かない。お前は誰だ？」
languages.original_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの要求は満たされた。私は動かない。お前は誰だ？」

languages.text: «He cumplido su solicitud y no me estoy moviendo. Ahora, identifíquese».
languages.original_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

traits.locale_text: «He cumplido su solicitud y no me estoy moviendo. Ahora, identifíquese».

languages.text: “我按你说的停下了。现在，报上你的身份。”
languages.original_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

traits.locale_text: “我按你说的停下了。现在，报上你的身份。”

languages.text: "Ich habe Eurer Bitte entsprochen und mich nicht bewegt. Und jetzt identifiziert Euch."
languages.original_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Eurer Bitte entsprochen und mich nicht bewegt. Und jetzt identifiziert Euch."

languages.text: "Talebini yerine getirdim ve kımıldamıyorum. Şimdi kendini tanıt."
languages.original_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Talebini yerine getirdim ve kımıldamıyorum. Şimdi kendini tanıt."

languages.text: « J'ai satisfait à votre demande et je ne bouge pas. Maintenant, identifiez-vous. »
languages.original_text: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai satisfait à votre demande et je ne bouge pas. Maintenant, identifiez-vous. »
